title: Ophthalmology
description: Ophthalmology is an important course for the major ophthalmology&optometry and a compulsory course for international medical students. It is a clinical medical discipline that studies the function of human visual organs and the occurrence, development, outcome, diagnosis, treatment and prevention of diseases. This course will teach the anatomy and physiology of the eye, eyelid disease, lacrimal apparatus disease, scleral disease, corneal disease, conjunctival disease, glaucoma, ocular trauma, etc.Taking advantage of the resources of  ophthalmology&optometry, our college has carried out modernized innovation on the teaching mode for international students. We are committed to establishing a set of characteristic medical course with high quality.
